reloadtab.title: Reload TAB Behavior
reloadtab.text: Controls whether the editor should replace TAB with spaces when it appears at the beginning of a line (this option is temporarily ineffective)

projectWin.project: Click to view details, double-click to open the project
projectWin.showInBrowser: Open the project folder in system file explorer
projectWin.createNewProject: Create a new project from template
projectWin.openFolder: Open a Yayin Story Studio project
projectWin.cloneFromGit: Clone a project from a given Git repository URL

project.author: Author
project.selectToShow: Select a project to view details...
project.deleteConfirm:
Yayin Story Studio currently does not support safe deletion of projects to the Recycle Bin.
Therefore, for safety, pressing OK will only remove the project from the list.
You may later delete the project manually in the file explorer.

Continue?

openProjectFailed.ParseError: Failed to parse project file, possibly due to syntax errors or corruption.
openProjectFailed.InvaildConfig: Invalid project configuration, missing required fields or incorrect field types.
openProjectFailed.UnknownError: An unknown error occurred and the project could not be opened.

project.newsLoadFailed: Failed to sync news from server. Please check your network connection and try again later.

saveQuestion.title: Close application?
saveQuestion.text: Your project %1 has unsaved changes. Do you want to save the project?

readOnly.title: File is read-only
readOnly.message: The file %1 you wish to save is read-only. You cannot save to this file. Please check file permissions or use Save As to save to a different location.

notSuitable.title: No service found to support this file
notSuitable.message: No suitable opening service found for file extension %1. YSS can still attempt to open the file using the default built-in text editor, but this may corrupt binary data. Are you sure you want to continue with the built-in text editor? (Strongly not recommended)

notFound.title: Oops! Debugger not found
notFound.message: The debugger %1 specified for this project was not found. Have you disabled or removed the plugin that provides this debugger? Please re-enable or add them, then restart the application and try again.

notSelect.title: Debugger not configured!
notSelect.message: This project does not have a debugger configured. Please open project settings, select a debugger, and try again.

saveWarning.title: File Modified
saveWarning.message: The file %1 has been modified. Do you want to save the changes?

reloadWarning.title: Reload now?
reloadWarning.message: The file %1 has been modified. If you reload now, any changes you made to this file will be lost. Do you want to reload?

warning.empty: Name cannot be empty. Please enter a name.
warning.same: New name is the same as the old name. Please enter a different name.
warning.exists: A file with this name already exists in the same directory. Please choose a different name.
warning.invalid: Invalid file name. It cannot contain the following characters: \ / : * ? " < > |

extNotSame.normal: The extension of the new name differs from the original, which may cause issues.
extNotSame.title: Are you sure you want to change the extension?
extNotSame.message: The extension %1 given in the new name differs from the original extension %2. This may cause problems, such as the file not being recognized or opened correctly. Are you sure you want to continue with the rename?

about.title: About Yayin Story Studio
about.message: Version %1, a Tsing Yayin work. Yayin Story Studio is part of Project Visindigo, a brand new project evolved from Yayin Story Player, aiming to provide an easy-to-use development environment for ASE users.
